wins_analysis: No wins today as the system generated zero recommendations. The AI model was unavailable and the zone score fallback produced no setups meeting minimum thresholds.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the complete absence of trades represents an opportunity cost. The fallback system failed to identify any actionable setups despite a clear trending_down regime with ADX=25 which should have produced short-side opportunities at supply zones.
regime_impact: Today's trending_down regime with ADX=25 and Nifty -1.1% was ideal for short/supply-zone strategies. The system completely missed this opportunity because the AI was unavailable and the fallback zone score logic appears too restrictive or misconfigured for bearish conditions.

improvements.action: Lower the zone score fallback threshold from current level to 65 (or whatever minimum is blocking) specifically when regime is trending_down and ADX >= 22, to allow SHORT setups at supply zones to pass through
improvements.reason: Zero setups found on a clean downtrend day with ADX=25 means the fallback filter is too aggressive. Strong downtrend days are high-probability SHORT environments.

improvements.action: Add a regime-aware bias to the fallback scanner: when regime=trending_down, scan ONLY supply zones and SHORT setups rather than requiring both demand and supply zones to score highly
improvements.reason: The fallback system likely evaluated both long and short setups equally, diluting focus. In a -1.1% Nifty day, only short setups should be prioritized.

improvements.action: Pre-identify 5-7 Nifty 50 stocks with the weakest relative strength (e.g., TATAMOTORS, HDFCBANK, INFY) and hardcode them as priority symbols for the fallback scanner during down-regime days
improvements.reason: Without AI probability scores, narrowing the universe to the weakest stocks in a downtrend increases the chance of finding valid supply zone setups.

improvements.action: Implement an alert/log when zero setups are generated so the system can re-scan at 10:30 AM with relaxed parameters (e.g., zone score threshold reduced by 10 points) rather than staying idle all day
improvements.reason: Today the system sat idle from open to close. A midday re-scan with slightly relaxed criteria could have captured afternoon breakdown setups.

improvements.action: If AI model remains unavailable tomorrow, manually override with at least 3 SHORT pending orders at nearest supply zones on high-beta stocks (TATAMOTORS, BAJFINANCE, ADANIENT) with 1:1.5 RR ratio
improvements.reason: Consecutive zero-trade days destroy system credibility and miss compounding. Even conservative manual entries in a confirmed downtrend are better than complete inaction.

tomorrow_focus: If downtrend continues (watch Nifty 50 holding below today's close and VIX staying above 16), aggressively scan for SHORT entries at supply zones on weak-RS stocks, ensuring the fallback system actually generates at least 3-5 recommendations.

symbol_notes.TATAMOTORS.NS: Typically high-beta, likely broke support today — check for supply zone SHORT setup near today's breakdown level
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE.NS: Financials tend to lead downtrends — scan for rejection at intraday supply zones
symbol_notes.ADANIENT.NS: High volatility name, likely offered large range candles today — look for continuation SHORT below today's low
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Heavyweight drags Nifty — if it closed weak, supply zone SHORT is high conviction
